title: Ancient Debris Finding Tool
description: Useful tool to easily find ancient debris while mining.
body:
![Working Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2c704c44eae944b6cbf79bfc30def74d5d4f26b.gif)
### This resource pack contains an animated texture of the ancient debris that changes it to the netherrack texture with an extra pulsating cyan color to make it easy to find.
 

The resource pack is only available for 1.21 but it works on **every version below**.

_Based on the "Rainbow Ancient Debris" resource pack by trickmint._
